# #12487 Canonical Meeting Artifact Evidence

Branch: `fix/12487-canonical-meeting-artifact`
Code PR: #13151
Human evidence follow-up: #13152

## What Was Proven

- Added `MeetingArtifact` as the canonical shared contract for meeting capture
  artifacts in `@elizaos/shared`.
- The schema represents:
  - meeting id, platform, capture mode, consent, and retention policy;
  - platform participant/session/tile ids;
  - source stream ids for local mic, system audio, tab audio, bot audio, mixed
    room mic, recording, mobile, cloud-agent, and imported corpus audio;
  - diarized speaker ids distinct from platform participant ids;
  - entity bindings distinct from diarized speaker ids;
  - speaker-name provenance from platform, calendar, self-introduction, user
    correction, voice profile, LLM inference, or unknown;
  - word/span timestamps, confidence, speaker attribution, overlap, source
    stream id, and correction history;
  - notes/action items/decisions grounded to transcript span ids;
  - media refs that use the existing content-addressed `/api/media/<sha>.<ext>`
    handle and explicitly reject legacy `fileId`.
- Added sample artifacts for:
  - Zoom per-participant audio;
  - Google Meet mixed room/system audio with one tile containing three physical
    speakers;
  - in-person room mic capture;
  - imported corpus audio;
  - one speaker moving across local/system source streams.
- Added pure runtime validation plus `assertValidMeetingArtifact()`.
- Added `meetingArtifactToTranscriptSegments()` so transcript mirroring can link
  back to the canonical artifact shape.
- Wired transcript creation to reject malformed `meetingArtifact` payloads and
  persist valid artifacts into transcript metadata.

## Focused Verification

```bash
bun run --cwd packages/shared test src/meeting-artifacts.test.ts
```

Result:

```text
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       11 passed (11)
```

```bash
bun run --cwd plugins/plugin-local-inference test src/routes/transcripts-routes.test.ts
```

Result:

```text
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       8 passed (8)
```

```bash
bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck
bun run --cwd plugins/plugin-local-inference typecheck
```

Result: both passed (`tsgo --noEmit -p tsconfig.json`).

```bash
bunx @biomejs/biome check --write \
  packages/shared/src/meeting-artifacts.ts \
  packages/shared/src/meeting-artifacts.test.ts \
  packages/shared/src/index.ts \
  plugins/plugin-local-inference/src/routes/transcripts-routes.ts \
  plugins/plugin-local-inference/src/routes/transcripts-routes.test.ts
```

Result: passed after formatting one touched file.

## Broader Verification

```bash
bun run --cwd packages/shared test
```

Result:

```text
Test Files  103 passed (103)
Tests       1173 passed (1173)
```

```bash
bun run --cwd packages/shared lint:check
```

Result: failed on unrelated existing formatting in
`packages/shared/src/voice/aec/echo-alignment.ts`:

```text
Formatter would collapse Math.max(1, Math.floor(options.minOverlapSamples ?? 4000))
```

Touched files passed the focused Biome check above.

```bash
bun run --cwd plugins/plugin-local-inference test
```

Result: failed with unrelated current-baseline failures:

- `src/routes/local-inference-route-contracts.fuzz.test.ts` expects ASR response
  without current `aec` metadata.
- `src/services/downloader.test.ts` invalid Eliza-1 manifest fixtures are
  missing required MTP kernel metadata.
- `__tests__/mmproj-routing.test.ts` expects pre-cutover missing-drafter
  fallback while current code throws `MissingMtpDrafterError`.

Summary from that run: `3 failed | 243 passed`, `14 failed | 2482 passed | 20 skipped`.

## Evidence Rows

- Type tests/runtime validation tests: covered by
  `packages/shared/src/meeting-artifacts.test.ts`.
- API route tests: covered by
  `plugins/plugin-local-inference/src/routes/transcripts-routes.test.ts`.
- Sample canonical JSON artifacts: generated by `buildMeetingArtifactFixtures()`
  for Zoom, Meet mixed-room, room mic, imported corpus, and cross-stream speaker.
- Before/after transcript store artifact: route tests prove valid
  `meetingArtifact` payloads are preserved in transcript metadata and invalid
  payloads are rejected before storage.
- Manual source-media/transcript-span review: N/A - tracked in human follow-up
  #13152 because it requires a running product build and reviewed UI/media
  artifacts.
